headings: Section 12. Applications for Payment, Releases, Lien-Free Project
text: for  use  in  the  Subcontract  Work  covered  by  this  Subcontract,  Subcontractor  will,  at  its  own  cost  and  expense, including attorney's fees, defend, indemnify and hold harmless Contractor, any surety of Contractor, Owner, the Project and the property on which it is situated from and against any such claim or suit and all damages, loss cost and expenses incurred in connection therewith, including but not limited to attorneys' fees, and Subcontractor shall pay  any  judgment  rendered  therein.  Subcontractor,  for  itself,  its  successors  and  assigns,  does  hereby  further expressly subordinate any and all claims of lien, lien or right to lien for labor or services performed or materials or equipment furnished by it hereunder which it may now or at any time hereafter have or be entitled to assert against Contractor, Owner or the Project in any manner connected with or arising out of its furnishing of labor, services, equipment or materials for the performance of that portion of the Project covered by this Subcontract or otherwise, including but not limited to any claim of lien against removeables, whether any such claim of lien, lien or right to lien be contractual or arise under the provisions of any statute, constitution or law whatsoever of the state in which the Work is to be performed, to any lien or deed of trust of any lender for the Project.
